name: Foundation/health
description: Health check endpoint (/health/check) conformance tests: a healthy server returns HTTP 200 with a JSON health report (from HealthTests). Body-content checks on the non-FHIR report aren't expressible with this engine, so the 'contains description' check is approximated via Content-Type.

test.name: health/check returns 200 OK
test.description: GET /health/check must return HTTP 200 when the FHIR server has started successfully.

test.name: health/check returns a JSON body (approximates the 'contains description' check)
test.description: Approximates the source test's body-text check: asserts the health check returns HTTP 200 with a JSON Content-Type, since raw body-text assertions aren't supported by this engine.

operation.description: Request the health check endpoint again for an independent content-type check

assert.description: Health check response must be JSON (approximation for the unassertable 'description' substring check)
